fixes.description: (LazyCat Auto-build) AI CLI Relay - Unified API for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex
fixes.author: kittors
fixes.description_zh: （懒猫微服自动构建）AI CLI 代理 - 统一 API 服务

clirelay.command: sh -lc 'mkdir -p /CLIProxyAPI/static /lzcapp/var/data/clirelay/auths /lzcapp/var/data/clirelay/logs && cp /lzcapp/pkg/content/management.html /CLIProxyAPI/static/management.html && if [ ! -f /lzcapp/var/data/clirelay/config.yaml ]; then cp /lzcapp/pkg/content/default-config.yaml /lzcapp/var/data/clirelay/config.yaml; fi && ln -sf /lzcapp/var/data/clirelay/config.yaml /CLIProxyAPI/config.yaml && rm -rf /root/.cli-proxy-api && ln -s /lzcapp/var/data/clirelay/auths /root/.cli-proxy-api && rm -rf /CLIProxyAPI/logs && ln -s /lzcapp/var/data/clirelay/logs /CLIProxyAPI/logs && exec /CLIProxyAPI/CLIProxyAPI'
